items.title: Google says half of all zero-days it tracked in 2025 targeted buggy enterprise tech

items.title: Originally $1,000 ASUS ROG Swift 27-inch 480Hz QHD OLED gaming monitor is down to $662 today (All-time low)
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at Amazon that drops ASUS’ ROG Swift 27-inch QHD WOLED gaming monitor down to $662.36 shipped. This is one of the pricier models in the brand’s ROG Swift lineup with a 480Hz panel that originally hit the scene carrying an eye-watering $1,000 price tag. It has more recently been going for $800, but today’s deal shaves an additional $138 off to mark a new best price to beat. This is lowest price we have tracked for this monitor, and it’s now going for $62 less than the previous all-time low it hit last month. Head below for more details.

items.summary:
Amazon is currently offering the Greenworks 24V 6-inch Mini Cordless Electric Chainsaw with 2.0Ah battery at $89.98 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. While it may carry a $160 MSRP direct from the brand, you can more often find it only going as high as $130 at Amazon, with it having kept down at $100 in 2026, until today. Now, with the price cut here, you’re saving $40 off the going rate (and $70 off the MSRP), dropping the costs to the second-lowest price we have tracked, beaten out by the $85 low we last saw during Black Friday.
